prompt: Write an XSIAM script called NormalizeAlertSeverity that takes an alert severity string (like 'high', 'CRITICAL', '3') and maps it to a numeric score (1–4). Output the normalized severity number and label to context.

assertions.text: register_module_line start is first line of script block
register_module_line end is last line of script block
All required boilerplate fields present (scripttarget, pswd, runas, engineinfo, mainengineinfo, enabled)
Docker image is pinned to a specific 3.12.x version
No content-pack-only fields present (fromversion, marketplaces, tests, timeout)
Every arg entry has supportedModules: [] as first key
Outputs include contextPath, description, and type
Script outputs both a numeric score and a label
